raw_title: Book Review: ‘Darkology,’ by Rhae Lynn Barnes
description: A new book by Rhae Lynn Barnes examines how minstrelsy once occupied the center of the nation’s cultural life.

raw_title: Book Review: ‘Almost Life,’ by Kiran Millwood Hargrave
description: In Kiran Millwood Hargrave’s novel “Almost Life,” a passionate love affair between two college women gives way to a lifetime of what-ifs.
